data.body: DECISION (user-approved): retire the advanced codeql.yml and keep GitHub default setup instead — default setup already scans 5 languages (python, javascript-typescript, actions) vs the advanced workflow's python-only, and it works. Disabling default + keeping python-only advanced would REGRESS coverage. Actions: (1) default-setup query_suite upgraded default->extended (security-extended) via API [done]; (2) advanced .github/workflows/codeql.yml deleted [this change]. Change 310 (advanced-workflow polish) abandoned as superseded.
